docket_entries.description: APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERNAL, ANSELMO

ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF BERNAL, ANSELMO

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON FEB-20-2013 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT ANSELMO BERNAL'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. APPLICANT HAS UNTIL 3/22/13 TO PAY ALL THE FEES AND COSTS OWED TO THE COURT. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: D. LOK; MATTER NOT REPORTED.
